title: OSPF: R20 Process 200, Router-ID Loopback0, Network Statements, /17 Summary (Area 40)
guidelines: Refer to the Tasks tab to view the tasks for this lab item.
Refer to the Topology tab to access the device console(s) and perform the tasks.
Console access is available for all required devices.
All necessary preconfigurations have been applied.
Do not change the enable password or hostname for any device.
Save your configurations to NVRAM before moving to the next item.
tasks: OSPF is preconfigured on all devices except R20. Configure R20 to complete these tasks.
Task 1: Configure OSPF according to the topology: (1) Use Process ID 200. (2) Use Loopback0 for the Router ID. (3) Advertise all networks into OSPF — USE network statements under the OSPF process.
Task 2: Configure a /17 summary route for Area 40.
hints: R20'de 'show run int lo0' ile Loopback0 adresini doğrula (20.20.20.20 bekleniyor); router-id bu adres olmalı.
Bu item network statement İSTER: 'network <ağ> <wildcard> area X' (Lo0 ve e0/0/e0/1 Area 0, e0/2 Area 40).
answer_key_raw:
R20:
R20> enable
R20# configure terminal
R20(config)# router ospf 200
R20(config-router)# router-id 20.20.20.20
R20(config-router)# network 20.20.20.20 0.0.0.0 area 0
R20(config-router)# network 10.10.20.0 0.0.0.255 area 0
R20(config-router)# network 10.20.30.0 0.0.0.255 area 0
R20(config-router)# network 10.40.50.0 0.0.0.255 area 40
R20(config-router)# area 40 range 10.40.0.0 255.255.128.0
R20(config-router)# end
R20# write
explanation: Item 7/21/25 ailesinin network-statement varyantı (Process 200, Loopback0): bu sefer OSPF geleneksel 'network' cümleleriyle açılır (Lo0 20.20.20.20/32, e0/0 10.10.20.0/24, e0/1 10.20.30.0/24 Area 0; e0/2 10.40.50.0/24 Area 40). Router-id = Loopback0 (20.20.20.20). /17 özet (255.255.128.0) ABR'de 'area 40 range 10.40.0.0 255.255.128.0' ile.
